Vendored MapLibre assets

These files are vendored to keep MCP-Apps UI widgets working in restricted
contexts (e.g. webviews / offline / no-CDN environments).

- Source project: MapLibre GL JS
- Version: 5.7.1
- License: 3-Clause BSD (see maplibre-gl-js.LICENSE.txt)

Files:
- maplibre-gl.js
- maplibre-gl.css
- maplibre-gl-csp-worker.js
